title: Balaban Renormalization Program Through EML

analysis.object: T825: Balaban Renormalization Program Through EML depth analysis

balaban_blocks.description: Balaban: renormalization by blocks -- organize UV divergences block by block

small_field_region.description: Small field region: perturbative (coupling small) -- EML-2 control

large_field_region.description: Large field region: non-perturbative -- requires EML-3 control

balaban_gap.description: Balaban 1980s: controlled small + large field in 4D YM to all orders but failed at continuum limit
balaban_gap.reason: Continuum limit = EML-inf step that failed

balabans_block_as_descent.description: Each block step = a Berkovich-Artin descent step (T814). Balaban stopped at the continuum limit -- which IS the formal GAGA step T772.
balabans_block_as_descent.reason: Balaban's gap = exactly formal GAGA step

completing_balaban.description: Complete Balaban: his block steps are the formal model steps (T757). His continuum limit = formal GAGA (T772). T775 closes his program.

t825_theorem.description: T825: Balaban's renormalization program stopped at the continuum limit = formal GAGA step. T775 (smooth projective descent = formal GAGA) COMPLETES Balaban's program. The 4D YM construction via Balaban + T775 is closed. T825.

analysis.theorem: T825: Balaban Renormalization Program Through EML (S1104).

key_theorem: T825: Balaban Renormalization Program Through EML (S1104).
